task_completion.description: Verify the Avare aviation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare app interface (map view, plan view, or main menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify KSFO is set as the origin waypoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight plan screen or waypoint list shows 'KSFO' entered as the first/origin waypoint.

task_completion.description: Verify an acceptable alternate airport is set as the destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight plan screen shows one of the acceptable alternate airports (KHAF, KSQL, KPAO, KLVK, KCCR, KWVI, KSJC, KNUQ, KOAK, or KAPC) entered as the next/destination waypoint.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight plan is a direct route.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight plan list contains exactly two waypoints (KSFO and the chosen alternate), or the map view shows a single direct line connecting them without intermediate waypoints.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight plan is saved with the name EMER.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, text input field, or saved plans list shows the flight plan being named or saved exactly as 'EMER'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the app's GUI to create the flight plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Avare's graphical interface (buttons, menus, plan screens) rather than a terminal or text editor being used to directly write a CSV file.

integrity.description: Verify the correct application is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the Avare Android application, not a web browser searching for flight plans or a different aviation app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively inputted the required data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be frames showing the on-screen keyboard being used to type the waypoints (KSFO, alternate) or the save name (EMER), or search results actively being selected.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a direct flight plan in the Avare app. The origin must be KSFO (San Francisco International Airport). The destination must be one of the following 10 acceptable Bay Area alternates: KHAF, KSQL, KPAO, KLVK, KCCR, KWVI, KSJC, KNUQ, KOAK, or KAPC. The flight plan must be saved internally in the app with the exact name 'EMER'.
